home.heroBody: High-end streetwear shaped by texture. Developed and produced with structural integrity in our European ateliers.
home.editorialBody: Developed in our Parisian ateliers to guarantee a perfect structural drape with no compromise. Every seam is conceived as an architectural line.
home.manifestoBody: Every piece is a response to the material. We create timeless forms with impeccable drape, combining the rigour of architecture with the softness of exceptional textures. Far from the frantic pace of fleeting trends, our creations are designed to last and structure one's silhouette.

product.shippingBody: Standard shipping 3–5 days. 24h express available. Returns accepted within 30 days, as new.
product.compositionBody: 100% Organic Cotton — 480 GSM Dense Weave. Made in our certified European ateliers.
product.careBody: Wash at 30°C. Do not iron. Do not tumble dry.

about.title: The Clé Paris Atelier
about.p1: Every piece is a response to the material. We create timeless forms with impeccable drape, combining the rigour of architecture with the softness of exceptional textures.
about.p2: Far from the frantic pace of fleeting trends, our creations are designed to last and structure one's silhouette. Every cut is studied in our Parisian ateliers, every cotton selected for its weight and hold, every seam reinforced to last through the seasons.
about.p3: Our vocabulary is clear: architectural silhouettes, dense materials, a restrained palette. The superfluous has no place here.

archive.title: Archive
archive.subtitle: Pieces from past seasons, preserved as witnesses to the evolution of the Clé Paris language.
archive.empty: The archive will be published at the next rotation.

order.title: Thank you for your order
order.body: Your payment has been confirmed. A confirmation email is on its way. We are preparing your order with care.

footer.manifesto: A technical wardrobe for those who reject the ephemeral.
